name: brass lantern
short_desc: A tarnished brass lantern. Shake it and you can hear oil sloshing inside.

name: flask of lamp oil
short_desc: A stoppered clay flask, heavy with oil and smelling faintly of pitch.

name: torch
short_desc: A pitch-wrapped stave, waiting for a spark.

name: tinderbox
short_desc: A small tin box of flint, steel, and dry tow.

name: hempen rope (50 ft)
short_desc: Fifty feet of scratchy hemp, coiled and frayed at the ends.

name: grappling hook
short_desc: Four iron prongs on a welded ring, scored from old catches.

name: trail rations (1 day)
short_desc: Hard biscuit, salt pork, and something resembling cheese, wrapped in waxed cloth.

name: bedroll
short_desc: A rolled wool blanket bound with leather ties, travel-stained.

name: thieves' tools
short_desc: A leather wrap of slender steel picks, tension wrenches, and a little mirror.

name: potion of healing
short_desc: A stoppered vial of wine-red liquid that glows faintly in the dark.

name: dagger
short_desc: A worn steel blade, its grip wrapped in sweat-darkened leather.

name: shortsword
short_desc: A short, straight blade, balanced for a quick thrust.

name: mace
short_desc: A flanged iron head on an ash haft, pitted from old strikes.

name: quarterstaff
short_desc: A length of ironwood, capped at both ends, worn smooth where hands have gripped it.

name: longbow
short_desc: A tall bow of yew, string waxed and humming at the faintest touch.

name: shortbow
short_desc: A recurved hunting bow, light in the hand, string taut as wire.

name: light crossbow
short_desc: A stocky wooden crossbow with an iron trigger and a windlass dangling from its stock.

name: quiver of arrows
short_desc: A stiff leather quiver holding twenty fletched shafts.

name: leather armor
short_desc: Boiled leather cut into overlapping plates, creaking with every step.

name: chain shirt
short_desc: Small iron rings woven dense enough to turn a knife, heavy across the shoulders.

name: plate armor
short_desc: Full steel plate, the breastplate scored but still mirror-bright where oil has reached it.

name: shield
short_desc: A banded wooden round, iron-rimmed, with a fresh gash across its face.

name: pouch of copper
short_desc: A drawstring pouch heavy with verdigrised copper coins.

name: pouch of silver
short_desc: A leather purse, silver shining dull through a tear in the seam.

name: pouch of gold
short_desc: A small felt purse, heavier than it looks, the coins inside warm-bright.

name: uncut gemstone
short_desc: A thumbnail of green crystal, rough-faceted, catching lamplight from deep inside.

name: jeweled ring
short_desc: A gold band set with a single garnet, its inner rim worn thin by a long-dead hand.

name: rusted royal seal
short_desc: A signet ring of pitted iron, the crown device worn almost smooth — but not quite.

name: sun-lens of the tomb
short_desc: A disc of polished quartz framed in gold leaf, warm even when no sun reaches it.

name: Thane Brenni's mug
short_desc: A dented pewter tankard, its rim incised with dwarven runes that spell a name and a curse.
